strengths: Experience with BI tools (Power BI, Tableau)
weaknesses: Limited or no Scrum/master certification or ceremony ownership
No direct Financial Services role documented
Epics creation and formal agile artifact ownership not demonstrated
improvement_bullets: Gathered and documented requirements from compliance and audit stakeholders, creating Epics and breaking them down into detailed user stories with acceptance criteria, and handing them off to development teams.

Actively participated in and facilitated Scrum ceremonies (stand-ups, sprint planning, retrospectives) as part of a cross-functional development team, contributing approximately 20% of my time to agile process management.

Leveraged strong technical abilities to write complex SQL queries against various data stores to perform detailed analysis, identify trends, and support business requirements within the financial services domain.
Applied data analysis techniques to financial data, collaborating with compliance and audit teams to gather requirements for reporting and analysis.
Collaborated with stakeholders in the financial services sector to gather requirements for compliance and audit functions, translating business needs into actionable technical specifications.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Business Analyst opportunity with Tata Consultancy Services (TCS). I am interested in this opportunity because of TCS's reputation for delivering innovative technology solutions and its commitment to professional development, which aligns perfectly with my career aspirations.

What interests me about working for TCS is its collaborative approach to client challenges and its focus on leveraging technology for business transformation. This approach excites and inspires me because I thrive in environments where I can bridge the gap between technical capabilities and strategic business goals.

I believe my expertise in data analysis and stakeholder management, coupled with my strong technical acumen, would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a results-oriented and detail-focused mindset. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed statistical models to identify high-value customer segments; targeted marketing initiatives informed by these models contributed to a 300% increase in revenue in the targeted segment over 12 months. This demonstrates my ability to translate complex data into actionable business strategies that drive significant financial impact.

Ultimately, I know that the Business Analyst role at Tata Consultancy Services would allow me to bring my analytical and stakeholder management skills to drive requirement gathering, user story creation, and data-driven decision-making for compliance and audit functions. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my agile facilitation and project management skills. I worked closely with stakeholders to standardize organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, resulting in a consistent 'single source of truth' for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies. This experience has honed my ability to manage projects effectively and ensure cross-functional alignment.

I’m excited by the opportunity to use my strong SQL skills and business analysis capabilities in working on critical compliance and audit initiatives at TCS. I know that my proven track record in data analysis, stakeholder engagement, and my commitment to delivering actionable insights align with what it takes to succeed in the Business Analyst role.

I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
